EUR_USD.notes: Primary pair. Tightest spreads, highest liquidity, most documented behavior.
EUR_USD.selection_rationale: Tightest average spread (1.77 pips) of all candidates. Lowest margin rate (2%) maximizes position size on $500 account. Moderate ATR(14) of 18.55 pips provides sufficient movement without excessive stop-loss distance. Max spread spike only 6.4 pips vs 15.7 for GBP_USD.

USD_JPY.notes: Secondary pair. Different character, Asian session activity, JPY safe-haven dynamics.
USD_JPY.selection_rationale: Second tightest spread (1.95 pips). Highest ATR(14) at 45.74 pips provides the most pip movement opportunity per trade. Different session profile than EUR_USD (active during Tokyo/Asian session). 5% margin rate means smaller position sizes but strong pip movement compensates.
